6919a134-b785-4bb9-937e-29fa2ae35faa.message: You're strongest in the locate mode where you nailed 75% of highlighted-country questions—you've got a solid instinct for reading maps. But flag identification is a real gap at 0%, and you're mixing up nearby Southeast Asian countries like the Philippines and Vietnam with Japan and Indonesia, so drilling those regional shapes and flags would make a big difference.
